summary: Complete Make.com API integration layer testing completed successfully. All backend APIs, frontend Integrations page, and external API endpoints tested and working correctly.

design_issues.issue: Chart width/height warnings in console - charts showing -1 dimensions

passed_tests: Admin login with correct credentials (admin@villapel.com / VillapelAdmin2024!)
Navigation to Integrations page from sidebar
API Keys section displays correctly with existing keys
Create API Key button opens dialog and creates keys successfully
API Key creation dialog shows key once with security warning
Webhook Endpoints section shows all 5 endpoints with copy buttons
All expected endpoints present: /api/external/leads/intake, /api/external/leads/update, /api/external/tasks/create, /api/external/bookings/create-or-update, /api/external/calls/log
Integration Logs section displays 11 recent API calls
Refresh button in Integration Logs works correctly
POST /api/external/leads/intake with X-API-Key header creates leads successfully
Lead deduplication works - same phone number updates existing lead
PATCH /api/external/leads/update with X-API-Key header updates lead status and notes
POST /api/external/tasks/create with X-API-Key header creates tasks linked to leads
POST /api/external/bookings/create-or-update creates booking and updates lead status to Booked
POST /api/external/calls/log logs call and links to lead by phone number
Notes are appended with timestamp, not replaced
Tags are merged and deduplicated correctly
API calls without X-API-Key header return 401 'Missing X-API-Key header'
Integration logs show all external API calls with timestamps and status codes
API key management (create/revoke) works correctly
Copy buttons for webhook endpoints work
All backend CRUD operations for leads, tasks, bookings, calls working
Dashboard metrics loading correctly
All standard API endpoints (leads, outreach, templates, etc.) working
